summary: Superb FLAC24 soundboard capture of an all‑cylinders night – crystal‑clear recording paired with a top‑flight performance.
review: The reviewer raves that the CM FLAC24 source delivers pristine, headphone‑ready clarity, even noting perfect tuning. Coupled with a band “firing on all cylinders,” the show is described as pure joy, making this one of the Dead’s standout recordings despite the lack of specific song citations.

ai_rating.rationale: A single, detailed 5‑star review praises both performance and recording; with no contradictory feedback, the rating leans toward excellent but confidence is medium due to limited sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer highlights superb FLAC24 clarity, crisp sound, and satisfying tuning; no issues noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall performance described as a night where the band was firing on all cylinders; flow praised implicitly.
